WebLink.url: {!URLFOR(IF($Site.prefix == '/s','/apex/dfsle__sending', $Site.Prefix +'/apex/dfsle__sending'), null, [sId = CONTAINER_Service_Agreement__c.Id, sendingExperience = 'null', isEmbedded = false, templateId = 'a3g7V000001N1gfQAC', recordId = CONTAINER_Service_Agreement__c.Id, title = 'Genset Doc'])}
